playerDisconnected: [SYS] {playerName} disconnected and forfeited. Assets returned to bank.
auctionSecuredWithSeller: [AUCTION] {winnerName} secured {tileName} with a bid of ৳{currentBid}, paying {sellerName}.
turnEnded: {playerName} ended their turn. It is now {nextPlayerName}'s turn.
bankruptcyDeclared: {playerName} declared bankruptcy and surrendered all assets to {creditorName}.
paidJailFine: {playerName} paid ৳50 fine and is released from Jail.
landedMortgaged: Landed on "{tileName}" which is currently mortgaged by {ownerName}. No rent due.
landedUnownedProperty: Landed on unowned property "{tileName}". Can buy for ৳{price}.
landedOwnedPropertyRentDue: Landed on "{tileName}" owned by {ownerName}. Rent of ৳{rentAmount} is due.
taxPaid: Landed on tax tile "{tileName}". Paid ৳{taxAmount} to the bank.
goCollected: and moved from tile {oldPos} to {newPos}, passing GO and collecting ৳200.
sentToJail: Player was sent directly to JAIL!
